question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not provide a list of the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only mentions some methods and tools without indicating how they will be organized into chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The passage does not describe the contents of individual sections or chapters. It focuses on techniques and tools rather than outlining what each part of the thesis will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: From the text alone, the overall structure of the thesis is not evident. There is no clear indication of how the introduction, literature review, methodology, results, and discussion will be arranged.
